nasb.text: Now it will come about that instead of sweet perfume there will be putrefaction; Instead of a belt, a rope; Instead of well-set hair, a plucked-out scalp; Instead of fine clothes, a donning of sackcloth; And branding instead of beauty.

esv.text: Instead of perfume there will be rottenness; and instead of a belt, a rope; and instead of well-set hair, baldness; and instead of a rich robe, a skirt of sackcloth; and branding instead of beauty.

cnv.text: 必有腐臭代替馨香， 繩子代替腰帶， 光禿代替美髮， 麻衣繫腰代替美服， 烙痕代替美貌。

ccb.text: 她们的香气将变成臭味， 腰带将变成绳子， 美发将变成秃头， 华服将变成麻衣， 美丽的容颜将布满羞辱的烙印。

csbs.text: 那时，腐臭必代替馨香， 绳索代替腰带， 光秃代替美发， 束身麻衣代替华服， 烙痕代替美貌。
